parts.text: 369 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِنَّ وَلِيَّ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَرَاهُ فِي

text: ثَلاَثَةِ مَوَاطِنَ حَيْثُ يَسُرُّهُ عِنْدَ اَلْمَوْتِ وَ عِنْدَ اَلصِّرَاطِ وَ عِنْدَ اَلْحَوْضِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.369 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Indeed, the follower of Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) will see him in three places that bring joy: at the time of death, at the Sirat (the bridge over Hell), and at the Hawdh (the Pool)."
